channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Release Date Announced for Canadian Comedy Film ‘Nirvanna The Band The Show The Movie’
item.description: The Canadian comedy film 'Nirvanna The Band The Show The Movie', adapted from the popular YouTube mockumentary and its Viceland TV spinoff, has finally secured a UK release. Directed by Matt Johnson a...

item.title: Life and Thoughts of Nalanda Commuters During a Bus Incident
item.description: This excerpt from Kalpish Ratna's 'Twice in Nalanda' narrates the inner lives of commuters from Nalanda Housing Society who face a tense situation while travelling in a battered minibus. The bus, once...

item.title: Police destroy P228 million worth of marijuana in Kalinga in two operations
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) reported that authorities have successfully destroyed around P228 million worth of marijuana plants in Kalinga during two eradication operations conducted on May 1...

item.title: Afterpay takes over naming rights of Sydney’s Qudos Bank Arena
item.description: Sydney's largest live entertainment venue, the 21,000-capacity Qudos Bank Arena in Homebush, is set for a rebrand. From July, the stadium, which attracts around 1.1 million visitors each year, will be...

item.title: Joburg Mayor Seeks Government Help to Avoid Citywide Power Cut Over R5.2bn Debt
item.description: Johannesburg mayor Dada Morero has urgently appealed to Electricity Minister Kgosientsho Ramokgopa to prevent the city from experiencing a widespread blackout due to an outstanding R5.2 billion debt o...

item.title: Kurt Cobain with Newborn Frances Bean at Home in West Hollywood, October 1992
item.description: In October 1992, photographer Stephen Sweet captured intimate photographs of Kurt Cobain at his home on Alta Loma Road in West Hollywood, California. The images show the Nirvana frontman holding his n...

item.title: Chinese Factory Owner Found Dead in Dar es Salaam, Police Investigating
item.description: Dar es Salaam has been shaken after the body of Bhaozang Ge, a 50-year-old Chinese businessman and owner of XIL LI plastic processing factory in Mabibo Sokoni, was found in a drainage trench within hi...

item.title: LPG crisis boosts adoption of biogas from wet waste, solar cookers and pellet stoves in India
item.description: The recent closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to West Asia conflict has caused a severe LPG shortage across India, leading to long queues, black marketing and prices skyrocketing up to Rs 5000 per cy...

item.title: Taifa Stars Drawn in Tough Group L for AFCON 2027 Qualifiers
item.description: Tanzania’s Taifa Stars have been drawn in Group L for the TotalEnergies CAF Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) PAMOJA 2027 qualifiers, facing strong opponents Nigeria, Madagascar, and Guinea-Bissau. Nigeri...

item.title: Met Police request reports from possible sexual assault victims linked to Married At First Sight UK
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have issued a public appeal for anyone who may have experienced sexual assault in connection with the television show 'Married At First Sight UK' to come forward and report the...

item.title: Boyfriend testifies in court, denying witnessing abuse by partner accused of baby’s death
item.description: At Preston Crown Court, John McGowan-Fazakerley, 32, the boyfriend of teacher Jamie Varley, 37, has testified that he never saw his partner harm or sexually assault the baby they were adopting. The in...

item.title: Trump Endorses Ken Paxton in Texas GOP Senate Runoff Amid Controversy
item.description: President Donald Trump has endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton for the upcoming GOP Senate runoff, giving Paxton a late boost against incumbent Sen. John Cornyn. The endorsement comes just a we...

item.title: Darren Groth Reflects on State of Origin, Family and Life Lessons in Memoir
item.description: Darren Groth, a lifelong Queensland Maroons supporter, has published his autobiography, 'Marooned: A Memoir of Fandom, Fatherhood and the Far Side of the World.' The book intertwines Groth's life stor...

item.title: Nigeria’s Oladipo wins Serie A Best Defender award after standout season
item.description: Nigeria international and Super Falcons defender, Oladipo, has been recognised as the Best Defender in Italy’s Serie A following an outstanding season marked by consistency, discipline, and strong lea...

item.title: Standard Chartered Plans Major Job Reductions and AI Integration by 2030
item.description: Standard Chartered, a London-based multinational bank, announced plans to reduce its workforce by more than 7,000 employees by 2030. CEO Bill Winters explained that the bank aims to replace certain ro...

item.title: Three Accused in R26 Million Covid-19 Relief Fraud in South Africa
item.description: In South Africa, a Malawian-linked couple, Fumu Mkalira Cifu Msiska and his wife Gladness, along with their relative Bongani Zoren Mkhonto, are facing over 4,000 charges of fraud and money laundering ...

item.title: PDP Grants Goodluck Jonathan Automatic Clearance as Presidential Candidate for 2027
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) faction wey Kabiru Turaki, SAN dey lead don give former President Goodluck Jonathan waiver from di usual presidential screening ahead of di 2027 election. As e be no...

item.title: The Prodigy to return to New York for first live show since 2009
item.description: The Prodigy, the iconic electronic dance band, have confirmed their first New York performance in 17 years, scheduled for Friday, 25th September 2026, at Under The K Bridge in Brooklyn. This concert w...

item.title: Analysis of Prime Minister Carney's Approach to Middle East Relations
item.description: On May 7, Prime Minister Mark Carney spoke with Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas, expressing criticism of Israel while praising unspecified reforms by the Palestinian Authority (PA). Crit...

item.title: Government and matatu owners reach temporary agreement to suspend strike after fuel price talks
item.description: On Monday and Tuesday, government officials including Interior CS Kipchumba Murkomen, Energy CS Opiyo Wandayi, National Treasury CS John Mbadi and Nairobi Governor Johnson Sakaja held closed-door meet...
